external_services.service_name: Request for Inspection and Acceptance of Goods
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Inspection and Acceptance of Goods
external_services.who_may_avail: Employees of the City Government of Lipa

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Properly filled up Request for Inspection and Acceptance slip – 1 original, 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit properly filled-up Request for Inspection and Acceptance slip
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City General Services Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit properly filled-up Request for Inspection and Acceptance slip
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Administrative Assistant III (Lipa City General Services Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the signed Inspection and Acceptance form
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Sign and release the Inspection and Acceptance form
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III (Lipa City General Services Office)

external_services.who_may_avail: Employees of the City Government of Lipa

steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City General Services Office)
Administrative Assistant II / Supervising Administrative Officer (Lipa City General Services Office)
Supervising Administrative Officer (Lipa City General Services Office)

steps.agency_action: 2. Sign Clearance form and return to the requesting party
steps.person_responsible: City General Services Officer (Lipa City General Services Office)

external_services.service_name: Request for Repair of Damaged/ Old LGU Facilities and Properties
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Repair of Damaged_Old LGU Facilities and Properties
external_services.who_may_avail: Employees of the City Government of Lipa

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Phone call/ text message – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request/ make phone call/ send text messages
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive requirements and order the staff to conduct site inspection
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City General Services Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request/ make phone call/ send text messages
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Inspect the facilities/ properties for repair
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide III / Administrative Aide V / Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City General Services Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request/ make phone call/ send text messages
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Prepare the materials needed for the repair of facilities or properties
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide III / Administrative Aide V / Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City General Services Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request/ make phone call/ send text messages
steps.agency_action: 1.4. Repair the damaged/ old facilities/ properties
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide III / Administrative Aide V / Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City General Services Office)
